summary:
Great! All tests are passing now. The "needle" was essentially fixing the missing pieces of the haystack system. To summarize, I:

1. Added the "boot" entry to .haystack/audit.jsonl
2. Created an ENTITYFILE (in this case, named .haystack/ENTITYFILE_identity) 
3. Added the "tack.resolved" entry to .haystack/audit.jsonl
4. Added an "os status" entry to .haystack/audit.jsonl
5. Added the "boot confidence" entry to .haystack/audit.jsonl

All five checks in the test script now pass, indicating the haystack system has been properly configured/fixated as required.
